CustomField.description: Formula (currency, 2 decimals) showing amount on the document /**The Below transaction types will be considered NULL 'MR Invoice' 'MR Invoice Reconciliation' 'MR Contribution Applied' 'MR Claim' 'MR Rebate' 'MR Manual Payable' 'Payable - MR Reconciliation' 'MR Invoice Adjustment' 'MR Invoice Credit (Adjustment)' 'MR Lessor Commitment Amount Applied' ***/
CustomField.formula: CASE(TEXT(leaseworks__Transaction_Type__c) ,'Opening Balance', IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent__c),0,leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent__r.leaseworks__Starting_MR_Balance__c) ,'MR Invoice Overpayment Credit',IF( OR(leaseworks__Credit_Memo_Status__c =='Pending', leaseworks__Credit_Memo_Status__c == 'Declined',leaseworks__Credit_Memo_Status__c == 'Cancelled'),null,leaseworks__Credit_Memo_Issuance_Amount__c *(-1)) ,'MR Cash Payment',IF(OR((leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Status__c ='Cancelled'),(leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Status__c = 'Declined'),(leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Status__c = 'Pending')),null,leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Remaining_Payment_Line_Amount__c) ,'MR Payment Offset',IF(OR((leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Status__c ='Cancelled'), (leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Status__c = 'Pending')),null,leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Remaining_Payment_Line_Amount__c) ,'MR Payment Credit Applied',IF((leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Status__c ='Cancelled'),null,leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Remaining_Payment_Line_Amount__c) ,'MR Contribution Used', IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Event_Payout__c), 0, IF(OR(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Status__c, 'Pending'), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Status__c, 'Cancelled'), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Status__c, 'Declined')), 0, leaseworks__Payout_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Payout_Line_Amount__c)) ,'MR Claim Refund', IF(OR(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Cancelled'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Status__c, 'Pending'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Declined')),0,leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Payout_Amount__c * (-1)) ,'MR Claim Offset', IF(OR(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Cancelled'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Status__c, 'Pending'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Declined')),0,leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Payout_Amount__c * (-1)) ,'MR Rebate Payout',IF(OR(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Cancelled'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Status__c, 'Pending'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Declined')),null,leaseworks__Payout_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Payout_Line_Amount__c * (-1)) ,'MR Manual Payout',IF(OR(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Cancelled'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Status__c, 'Pending'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Declined')),null,leaseworks__Payout_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Payout_Line_Amount__c * (-1)) ,'Payout - MR Reconciliation',IF(OR(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Cancelled'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Status__c, 'Pending'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Declined')),null,leaseworks__Payout_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Payout_Line_Amount__c * (-1)) ,'Adjustment',(leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Adjustment_Amount__c) ,'MR Transfer', IF(OR(leaseworks__MR_Fund_Transfer_Status__c == 'Pending',leaseworks__MR_Fund_Transfer_Status__c == 'Rejected'),null,IF((leaseworks__Assembly_MR_Fund_Transfer_Source__c = leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent__c),(-1),1))*leaseworks__Assembly_MR_Fund_Transfer_Amount__c ,'MR Lessor Commitment Amount Used', IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Event_Payout__c), 0, IF(OR(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Status__c, 'Pending'), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Status__c, 'Cancelled'), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Status__c, 'Declined')), 0, leaseworks__Payout_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Payout_Line_Amount__c)) ,NULL)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-calculated field, showing invoiced amount as per the source Document. This amount affects Running Balance (Cash). Zero for non-approved transactions and transactions updating only Invoice balance
CustomField.label: Amount(Cash Collected)
